ASSIGNEE MARK SCHULMAN AS TRUSTEE OF THE MARK SCHULMAN 401's Motion For Order Amending Memorandum Of Costs After Judgment And Renewal Of Judgment To Correct Clerical Error is granted. No opposition filed.
